tool_input.command:
python - <<'PY'
import json, os, glob
from pathlib import Path
from collections import Counter, defaultdict
base=Path('memory/long_term')
print('BASE', base.resolve())
files=list(base.iterdir()) if base.exists() else []
print('total files', len(files))
print('suffix/name categories')
cat=Counter()
for p in files:
    if p.name=='index.json': cat['index.json']+=1
    elif p.name=='index.pending.json': cat['index.pending.json']+=1
    elif p.name.startswith('index.') and p.name.endswith('.tmp'): cat['index.*.tmp']+=1
    elif '.corrupt_' in p.name and p.name.endswith('.bak'): cat['corrupt bak']+=1
    elif p.name.startswith('memory_item_') and p.suffix=='.json': cat['memory_item json']+=1
    elif p.name.startswith('summary_') and p.suffix=='.json': cat['summary json']+=1
    else: cat['other']+=1
print(cat)
print('\nother/tmp/bak files:')
for p in files:
    if not ((p.name=='index.json') or (p.name.startswith('memory_item_') and p.suffix=='.json') or (p.name.startswith('summary_') and p.suffix=='.json')):
        print(p.name, p.stat().st_size)

items=[]; bad=[]; summaries=[]
for p in base.glob('memory_item_*.json'):
    try:
        data=json.loads(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
        items.append((p,data))
    except Exception as e:
        bad.append((p,str(e)))
for p in base.glob('summary_*.json'):
    try:
        data=json.loads(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
        summaries.append((p,data))
    except Exception as e:
        bad.append((p,str(e)))
print('\nparse bad', len(bad))
for p,e in bad[:20]: print('BAD',p.name,e)
print('items',len(items),'summaries',len(summaries))

# schema/key stats
kind=Counter(str(d.get('kind') or d.get('type') or '') for _,d in items)
status=Counter(str(d.get('status') or '') for _,d in items)
print('kind',kind)
print('status',status)

missing=[]
for p,d in items:
    req=['id','title','content','created_at','updated_at','importance','confidence','status']
    miss=[k for k in req if k not in d or d.get(k) in (None,'')]
    if miss: missing.append((p.name,miss,d.get('title','')[:60]))
print('missing/empty required-ish', len(missing))
for row in missing[:30]: print(row)

# duplicate IDs and duplicate title/content hash
ids=defaultdict(list)
fp=defaultdict(list)
for p,d in items:
    ids[d.get('id')].append(p.name)
    key=(str(d.get('kind') or d.get('type') or ''), str(d.get('title','')).strip(), str(d.get('content','')).strip())
    fp[key].append((p.name,d.get('updated_at',''),d.get('status',''),d.get('importance')))
print('\nduplicate ids', sum(1 for v in ids.values() if len(v)>1))
for k,v in list(ids.items()):
    if len(v)>1: print('DUPID',k,v)
print('duplicate exact content groups', sum(1 for v in fp.values() if len(v)>1))
for k,v in fp.items():
    if len(v)>1:
        print('DUPCONTENT',k[0],k[1][:80], 'count',len(v))
        for x in v[:10]: print(' ',x)

# low quality heuristics
low=[]
for p,d in items:
    title=str(d.get('title','')).strip(); content=str(d.get('content','')).strip()
    if len(title)<5 or len(content)<20 or title.startswith('工具执行') or '工具执行成功' in title or '工具执行失败' in title or content.startswith('STDOUT:') or content.startswith('[SEARCH]') or content.startswith('--- 文件:'):
        low.append((p.name,d.get('kind') or d.get('type'),title[:80],len(content),d.get('importance'),d.get('status')))
print('\nlow-quality heuristic',len(low))
for row in low[:80]: print(row)

# index consistency quick
idx=base/'index.json'
if idx.exists():
    data=json.loads(idx.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    print('\nindex counts', {k: len(v) if isinstance(v,dict) else len(v) for k,v in data.items()})
    missing_paths=[]
    for id_, path in data.get('item_index',{}).items():
        if not Path(path).exists(): missing_paths.append((id_,path))
    print('index missing item paths',len(missing_paths))
PY
